violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution for the almond milk bucket was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Bucket was emptied and refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025
The handle inside the walk-in refrigerator was observed in poor repair. Handle to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The handle on the walk-in was observed in poor repair. Per PIC, handle has been ordered. The grout in the back prep/dishwasher area is in poor repair. It is allowing for food accumulation too occur in the crevice. Grout to be redone. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The floor behind the ice machine has an accumulation of built up debris. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
